Bizarre Lineage Sub Abilities

Sub Abilities in Bizarre Lineage provide passive bonuses, powerful utility skills, and alter your core gameplay loop. Pick the right Bizarre Lineage sub ability to complement your Stand and fighting style build.

Parts 1-2

Hamon

Channel the energy of the sun through your body. High damage output, anti-Vampire properties, and th...

Passive: Bonus damage vs Vampires, slight HP regeneration in sunlight.
PvP7
PvE7
Survival4
 Part 7

Spin

Master the art of the Steel Ball. Ranged pressure with block bypass makes Spin the highest-skill-cap...

Passive: Fully charged attacks bypass blocking.
PvP9
PvE5
Survival3
 Part 2

Cyborg

Mechanical enhancements for maximum tankiness. Massive AoE damage and the highest survival rating of...

Passive: Increased base defense. Immune to bleed effects.
PvP5
PvE9
Survival9
 Parts 1-3

Vampire

Embrace the darkness with life-stealing abilities. Strong sustain in PvP and PvE, but critically wea...

Passive: Life steal on melee hits. Reduced HP regen in sunlight.
PvP7
PvE7
Survival7
